context: Tests whether the agent uses the obsidian read command with the file= parameter (wikilink-style resolution) instead of the path= parameter when the exact vault path is unknown.

checklist.name: Uses obsidian read command
checklist.description: The agent invokes the obsidian CLI with the read subcommand

checklist.name: Uses file= parameter
checklist.description: The agent uses file= to target the note by name (wikilink-style), not path=

checklist.name: Note name is quoted
checklist.description: The note name value is quoted because it contains spaces: file="Meeting Notes 2024-01-15"

checklist.name: Does not use path= parameter
checklist.description: The agent does not use path= since the exact vault-root path is not known
